details: The agent successfully navigated to https://github.com/facebook/react/issues, extracted real issue titles with specific technical content, reported the open issue count as 820 (which is in the hundreds as expected), and provided 5 specific issue titles with issue numbers. The titles are clearly real GitHub issues (not hallucinated), including specific technical details like 'DO_NOT_USE_OR_YOU_WILL_BE_FIRED_EXPERIMENTAL_IMG_SRC_TYPES', 'TypedArray props', 'Fiber', and 'script defer'. Issue #36175 having only 'Bug:' as its title was verified by navigating to the issue page directly.
